richText.heading: Every price, published.
richText.body: No hidden fees, no pressure on the table, no "ask for pricing." Tap any price to book that treatment and length. Published prices, the same for everyone.

promoStrip.heading: Gift a treatment
promoStrip.subline: Never expires, sent in a minute.

richTextPolicies.heading: Good to know
richTextPolicies.body: Nothing is charged at booking — pay after your treatment. Cancellation: 4 hours' notice, no charge. Gratuity is at your discretion and never required. We accept card, cash, Apple Pay and Spa Paradise gift cards.

ctaBanner.heading: Found the one? It takes a minute to book.

seo.title: Spa Menu & Massage Prices | Spa Paradise Middletown
seo.description: Transparent spa & massage pricing in Middletown, NY. Swedish from $45, deep tissue, hot stone, couples, facials & more. Published prices, no surprises.
keywords: how much is a massage middletown
